briefdescription.para: This is the scale factor to scale the input image. The processing will happen on the scaled down image The topics and the output coordinates will correspond to the scaled image size.
Variable to choose which floor detection algorithm to run.
Enable Fallback floor detection algorithm(Threshold Y based) if RANSAC fails.
Result status of RANSAC floor detection If the status is true then RANSAC result can be considered, otherwise, run the Threshold Y based floor detection.
Rotation around X axis in radian.
Rotation around Y axis in radian.
Rotation around Z axis in radian.
Flag for camera rotation.
distance (25mm) which determines how close the point must be to the RANSAC plane in order to be selected as inlier.
Maximum number of RANSAC iterations (10) which is allowed.
Camera height, default is 0.1524m (6 inches)
Threshold to filter the point cloud based on depth (Z) Select the points with depth value lesser than 1.5m from the sensor.
Points which are lower than floor.
Number of iterations RANSAC has taken for floor detection.
Time (ms) RANSAC has taken for floor detection.
Floor height with offset for Threshold Y based floor detection.
Floor distnace threhsold wrt sensor.
Floor mask.
Compressed floor mask.
Compressed floor pixels count.
Construct a new ADI3DToFFloorDetector object.
This function runs at a given frequency and runs the algorithm.
Destroy the ADI3DToFFloorDetector object.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned short *depth_frame, unsigned short *ab_frame, unsigned char *floor_mask_frame, short *xyz_frame)
memberdef.name: publishImageAndCameraInfo

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned char *compressed_depth_frame, int compressed_depth_frame_size, unsigned char *compressed_ab_frame, int compressed_ab_frame_size, unsigned char *compressed_floor_mask_frame, int compressed_floor_mask_frame_size, short *xyz_frame)
memberdef.name: publishImageAndCameraInfo

memberdef.argsstring: (const cv::Mat &img, const std::string &encoding_type, const std::string &frame_id, rclcpp::Publisher< sensor_msgs::msg::Image >::SharedPtr publisher)
memberdef.name: publishImageAsRosMsg

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned char *compressed_img, int compressed_img_size, const std::string &encoding_type, const std::string &frame_id, const rclcpp::Publisher< sensor_msgs::msg::CompressedImage >::SharedPtr publisher)
memberdef.name: publishCompressedImageAsRosMsg

memberdef.argsstring: (short *input_point_cloud, short *rotated_point_cloud, CameraExtrinsics *camera_extrinsics, int image_width, int image_height)
memberdef.name: rotatePointCloud

briefdescription.para: new values from dynamic reconfigure are copied to a struture variable here, actual update to individual parameters happens in updateDynamicReconfigureVariablesInputThread and updateDynamicReconfigureVariablesProcessThread functions.
This is main class for this package.
